title: Daily Tracking
description: Mark today's worship, counters, and progress. Scores are calculated automatically when you save.
worshipDescription: Browse all worship categories and activities.
connectionProblem: There was a problem connecting to the server.
emptyCategoriesDescription: Ask your administrator to add categories and items.

checklist.title: Today's worship checklist
checklist.description: Complete each item once it is done. Counter items complete only when they reach their target.

flow.saveNote: Tracking is saved when you finish the day.
flow.prayerNoteHint: Add context for your mentor, such as why a congregation prayer was missed.
flow.prayerNotePlaceholder: Example: I missed congregation because I was at work.

lowProgress.title: Progress needs support
lowProgress.message: Your score was below 50% on {{count}} days this week. I recommend contacting your mentor so they can help you understand what got in the way and plan a steadier next day.

customize.addDescription: Choose an item from the worship library and it will appear in your daily checklist.
customize.noAvailableItems: No more worship items are available to add.
customize.saveFailed: Could not update your worship schedule.
customize.customTitleHint: This item is private to your daily worship schedule and starts with 0 points.
customize.createFailed: Could not add this custom worship item.

week.completedDescription: Your score has been calculated. The rest of the week stays visible, and only the current tracking day can be edited.

rewards.title: Badges and achievements
rewards.description: These are the rewards your worship unlocked today.
rewards.empty: No new badges or achievements today yet. Keep going.

missions.title: Mission rewards
missions.description: Check weekly and monthly mission prizes.

weekly.title: Weekly progress
weekly.description: Review this week's score and consistency.

monthly.title: Monthly journey
monthly.description: See badges, achievements, and month totals.

high.label: Beautiful consistency
messages: "أحب الأعمال إلى الله أدومها وإن قل" (متفق عليه) — ثباتك النهاردة هو عين المطلوب، استمر عليه.
يوم مكتمل بفضل الله، واصل — فالثبات على الطاعة من أعظم النعم.
"إن الله يحب إذا عمل أحدكم عملاً أن يتقنه" (رواه البيهقي) — كده يا بطل، إتقان حقيقي.

medium.label: A steady step
messages: "استقيموا ولن تحصوا" — ما حد يقدر يكمّل كل حاجة، المهم إنك على الطريق. كمّل بكرة.
من كلام السلف: "ليس الشأن أن تعمل، الشأن أن يُتقبّل منك" — خطوة كويسة، النية أهم من العدد.
"بداية طيبة، واذكر قول النبي ﷺ: 'السداد والمقاربة' — قارب واجتهد ولو ما وصلتش للكمال."
نص الطريق أحسن من الوقوف — استمر وربنا يبارك في المتبقي.

low.label: A meaningful start
messages: "لا تحقرن من المعروف شيئًا" (رواه مسلم) — اللي عملته النهاردة مش قليل، وبكرة فرصة تزيد.
من كلام ابن القيم رحمه الله: "من علامة النجاح تدارك التقصير لا الحزن عليه" — يلا يا بطل، بكرة يوم جديد.
الاستمرار أهم من الكمال — جرب تاني بكرة، والله غفور رحيم.

ONBOARDING_INCOMPLETE.title: Your setup is almost ready
ONBOARDING_INCOMPLETE.description: Your account still needs region setup before today's worship can be prepared.

NO_ACTIVE_WORSHIP_LEVEL.title: No active worship level
NO_ACTIVE_WORSHIP_LEVEL.description: Your account does not have an active worship level yet. Please contact your mentor or administrator.

NO_LEVEL_REQUIREMENTS.title: No requirements configured
NO_LEVEL_REQUIREMENTS.description: Your current worship level does not have requirements configured yet.

NO_WORSHIP_ITEMS_CONFIGURED.title: No worship items available
NO_WORSHIP_ITEMS_CONFIGURED.description: The requirements for your level do not currently point to active worship items.
